description_long: This is a classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and a long, blued steel barrel. The rifle features a fixed, full-length stock with a curved buttplate and a prominent trigger guard. A clip of ammunition is shown above the receiver, indicating it uses a stripper clip for loading an internal magazine. The iron sights are visible, with a rear notch and a front post, suitable for precise aiming. The metal components, including the bolt, receiver, and barrel, have a dark, matte finish, while the stock is a rich, polished brown wood. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, typical of early-to-mid 20th-century military rifles.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, long blued barrel, iron sights, and a visible ammunition clip above the receiver. The design is robust and utilitarian, with a mix of dark metal and polished wood.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing the round barrel profile and front sight post.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, metal barrel, and a clip of ammunition above the receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rifle's length, stock, and ammunition clip, mirroring view 1.
